## Affected Area

- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Compiler
- [ ] Runtime
- [ ] Package manager
- [ ] Installer
- [ ] Updater
- [ ] GitHub Actions
- [ ] VS Code extension
- [ ] YuriLS

## Summary

Describe the concern without posting active secrets or exploit details that could harm users.

## Impact

What can an attacker or broken workflow do?

## Reproduction

Share safe reproduction steps. Redact tokens and private repository data.

## Suggested Fix

Optional.
